titleStmt.title: SII 39.140: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 140. (A.R. No. 140 of 1916.) MĒLŪR, PONNERI TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. SUGANDAPURIŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE WEST AND SOUTH WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE. TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN VIJAYAGAṆḌAGŌPALA DĒVA3rdYEAR (1253 A.D.)

summary.p: Built in at the end. This inscription mentions the agreement of some Śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple of Tirumaṇaṅgāvuḍaiya-nāyaṉār at Vallūr of Nāyarunāḍu of Puḻarkōṭṭam of Jayaṅgoṇḍa-chōḷa-maṇḍalam for maintaining a perpetual lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ vicaiyakaṇṭakopāla tevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 vatu makaranāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu saptamiyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttiraṭṭāti nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattup puḻaṟkoṭṭattu nāyaṟunāṭṭu vallūruṭaiyār tirumaṇaṅkāvuṭaiya nāyanāṟku Ivvūr
ril bhāradvāji śrīgotrattuc ceṉāpatipaṭṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭārum Ikkuṭi taḻuvakkuḻaintāṉ paṭṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭārum nāṟpatteṉṉāyirapaṭṭaṉ caraṇappiḷḷaiyum gautama gotrattu Āḷumpirāṉ paṭṭaṉ śivañāṉa ṉum Ivvaṉaivomittiri ṉuntāviḷakku Oṉṟukku cantirātittavarai kaṭavomākavum celuttu
yum ceṉāpatipaṭṭaṉum Uḷḷiṭṭārum taḻuvakkuḻaintāṉpaṭṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭārum Āḷumpirāṉpaṭṭaṉ civa ñaṉa tevaru Ippaṭikku koyiṟ karaṇattārom śrīmāheśvara rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 39.140 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
